module.name: video
module.description: A video player: plays a local video FILE (deck-relative path / @alias / URL / data-URI) or a YouTube URL. Autoplay-on-show or play-on-click, optional loop and mute, click to pause/resume. Movable, resizable and rotatable on the preview. Self-contained (no @end).
module.aiSpec:
A VIDEO PLAYER. Self-contained directive (NO body, NO `<!-- @end -->`) — all options are parameters. Plays EITHER a local/served video file OR a YouTube video: • a video FILE: `src` = a path RELATIVE TO THE DECK, an @alias, a URL, or a data-URI (e.g. ./movie/clip.mp4). Rendered as an HTML5 <video>; the deck-relative path is resolved to a served URL automatically. • a YOUTUBE video: `src` = any youtube.com/watch?v=… , youtu.be/… or /embed/… URL. Rendered as an embedded player (needs internet; the app is otherwise offline-first).
Playback: • trigger: `click` (default) = play when the module is clicked; `auto` = start playing when the slide is shown. (Autoplay WITH sound is blocked by browsers, so `auto` falls back to MUTED autoplay; the viewer can unmute via the controls.) • Clicking the player toggles PAUSE / RESUME (file video with controls off). • loop: repeat when it ends. muted: start muted. • controls (file video only): show the native scrubber/volume bar (default false; when on, use the native controls instead of click-to-toggle).
Size & placement: `width` sets the initial width in px (height follows 16:9). The player is MANIPULABLE — drag to move, resize from a corner, rotate — on the preview in Edit layout; the position/size/rotation are written back as x/y/w/h/rot args.
<!-- @video src: ./movie/clip.mp4, trigger: auto, loop: true, muted: true, width: 640 --> <!-- @video src: https://youtu.be/dQw4w9WgXcQ, trigger: click, width: 560 -->

param.name: src
param.label: Source
param.desc: Video file path (relative to the deck) / @alias / URL / data-URI, OR a YouTube URL.

param.name: trigger
param.label: Play trigger
param.desc: Start on click, or automatically when the slide is shown (auto falls back to muted).

param.name: loop
param.label: Loop
param.desc: Repeat the video when it ends.

param.name: controls
param.label: Native controls
param.desc: Show the browser's scrubber/volume bar (file video). Off = click to play/pause.

param.name: width
param.label: Width (px)
param.desc: Initial width; height follows a 16:9 ratio. Resize freely on the preview.

snippet.label: Video (file, autoplay muted loop)
snippet.text: <!-- @video src: ./movie/clip.mp4, trigger: auto, muted: true, loop: true, width: 640 -->
snippet.description: Local video file, autoplays muted and loops when the slide is shown.

snippet.label: Video (file, click to play)
snippet.description: Local video file; click the player to play, click again to pause.
